full_suite.failure_notes: Eight failures are the known managed-sandbox socket denials. The other 29 are outside this lane and cluster in best-stack integrity, court evaluation/fixtures, scaffold-index, and storage-policy tests, but were not proven to fail at HEAD in this turn.

honest_issues: All three pre-registered presets are dead under the kill rule.
Taxonomy verdict is needs-typed-anchors. Review-only audio cannot provide contact semantics, flight resets, z=radius constraints, or flight-gate anchors.
Fit coverage is not accuracy; no GT exists, VERIFIED=0 remains binding, and outputs are preview-band.
The audio artifact is review-only and not_gate_verified.
Overall maximum segment duration remains 111.93 s because unsplit and weak fallback spans remain.
A separate 5 s first-2100-frame parity diagnostic was only 3/5 identical due cooperative deadline load sensitivity; authoritative no-trip comparisons were 5/5 each.
The wide suite is not green, and 29 failures beyond the known socket denials were not proven pre-existing at HEAD.
No runner, stage, flight-sanity gate, production guard, branch, commit, or promotion surface was changed.
next: Wait for Track G typed event/contact anchors, then rerun the same frozen flight-sanity gate and require zero violations before Track C considers default-off refinedstage wiring. Do not tune another audio preset against coverage.
